message:
feat(fp-frankentui): expand TUI integration library with 387 lines of new functionality

Major expansion of the fp-frankentui crate's lib.rs with new TUI
integration features. This adds significant new functionality to the
frankenpandas-frankentui bridge including additional widget support
and rendering capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
